summary: Russia is preparing a major combined attack on Kyiv involving ballistic, cruise, and hypersonic missiles along with strike drones, pending the redeployment of Tu-95MS bombers from Ukrainka to Olenya airfield. A massive drone attack on Moscow is underway with 67 drones reportedly shot down and Vnukovo and Domododedovo airports closed. Ukrainian forces struck the Titan-Barricady plant in Volgograd with FP-5 Flamingo missiles, hitting a facility producing artillery systems and missile launcher components.
key_points: Russia is preparing a major attack on Kyiv using ballistic, cruise, and hypersonic missiles plus strike drones, pending Tu-95MS bomber redeployment from Ukrainka to Olenya. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68110)
A massive drone attack on Moscow is underway; 67 drones reportedly shot down, Vnukovo and Domododedovo airports closed, mass flight delays reported. (Source: @eRadarrua/98389)
Ukrainian FP-5 Flamingo missiles struck the Titan-Barricady plant in Volgograd, a facility producing artillery systems and missile launcher components. (Source: @UkraineNow/82221)
Up to 30 Shahed drones launched from Kursk, with multiple UAV groups tracked across Sumy, Kharkiv, Poltava, Chernihiv, and Dnipropetrovsk regions. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68106)
Russian forces struck the Sambek Heights memorial complex in Rostov Oblast, injuring 12 people including a seven-year-old girl. (Source: @tass_agency/382689)
Russian forces liberated the village of Novoskelivatoye in Dnipropetrovsk Oblast, per the Russian Ministry of Defense. (Source: @tass_agency/382687)
A Ukrainian drone attack on a parked car in Bryansk Oblast's Petryanka village killed two people. (Source: @tass_agency/382683)
Seven Ukrainian civilians aged 35-66, illegally detained by Russia since 2022, were returned home from captivity. (Source: @UkraineNow/82226)

sections.executive_summary: Russia is preparing a major combined attack on Kyiv involving ballistic, cruise, and hypersonic missiles along with strike drones, pending the redeployment of Tu-95MS bombers from Ukrainka to Olenya airfield. A massive drone attack on Moscow is underway with 67 drones reportedly shot down and Vnukovo and Domododedovo airports closed. Ukrainian forces struck the Titan-Barricady plant in Volgograd with FP-5 Flamingo missiles, hitting a facility producing artillery systems and missile launcher components.

points: Ukrainian FP-5 Flamingo missiles successfully struck the Titan-Barricady industrial plant in Volgograd, a major facility producing artillery systems and special military equipment including missile launcher components. Hits were recorded with subsequent fires on the plant's territory. (Source: @UkraineNow/82221)

A massive Ukrainian drone attack targeted Moscow, with 67 drones reportedly shot down by Russian air defenses. Vnukovo and Domododedovo airports were closed, and mass flight delays were reported across the Moscow aviation hub. (Source: @eRadarrua/98389)

Seven Ukrainian civilians aged 35-66 were returned home after years of illegal detention by Russia. All were detained in 2022 during the occupation of Mariupol, Kyiv, Kharkiv, Zaporizhzhia, and Luhansk regions, including Buchanskyi district of Kyiv Oblast. (Source: @UkraineNow/82226)

Ukraine's HUR MO is conducting urgent fundraising for 3 long-range FPV drones on fiber optics capable of destroying Russian equipment heading to Crimea or the front line, with each drone costing 40,000 UAH. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68124)

Fuel shortages are reported in Ukraine's frontline areas, with fuel truck drivers refusing to travel there due to constant drone strike threats, according to fuel expert Sergey Kuyun. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31199)

A gas station in Zaporozhye burned down following a Russian airstrike. Gas station networks in Trostyanets have been completely destroyed, with stations in Kharkov and Zaporozhye also regularly attacked. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31201, @ukr_leaks_eng/31213)

Russia is preparing a major combined attack on Kyiv using ballistic, cruise, and hypersonic missiles along with strike drones. The attack is pending redeployment of Tu-95MS bombers from Ukrainka airfield to Olenya airfield. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68110)

Russian forces struck the Sambek Heights memorial complex near Taganrog in Rostov Oblast, injuring 12 people including a seven-year-old girl who remains hospitalized. The complex has suspended operations. (Source: @tass_agency/382689, @tass_agency/382690)

Russian forces liberated the village of Novoskelivatoye in Dnipropetrovsk Oblast, according to the Russian Ministry of Defense. Russian forces are also striking Orkhovatka in DNR where Ukrainian forces retreated after losing Ray-Oleksandrivka. (Source: @tass_agency/382687, @tass_agency/382709)
A Ukrainian drone attack on a parked car in Petryanka village, Bryansk Oblast killed two people. The drone struck a vehicle near a shop, killing the driver. (Source: @tass_agency/382683)

Russian Aerospace Forces and Chinese PLA Air Force conducted joint strategic patrol. Putin and Lukashenko continued communications at the Russian leader's Valdai residence. (Source: @tass_agency/382687, @tass_agency/382682)
Russian forces destroyed two Ukrainian MiG-29 aircraft at Voznesensk airfield in Mykolaiv Oblast using a Geran-4 Siker UAV. (Source: @tass_agency/382687)

Up to 30 Shahed drones were launched from the Kursk direction. Multiple UAV groups are tracked across Kharkiv Oblast heading toward Kharkiv city, Sharivka, and Staryi Merchik, with some crossing into Dnipropetrovsk Oblast. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68106, @kpszsu/66568, @eRadarrua/98432)

A ballistic missile was tracked toward Chuhuiv in Kharkiv Oblast. Reconnaissance UAVs are operating in eastern Poltava Oblast near Opishnia and Karlivka, potentially designating targets for Russian strike systems. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68136, @kpszsu/66548)

Russian forces liberated Novoskelivatoye in Dnipropetrovsk Oblast. KAB guided bomb strikes were reported on Donetsk Oblast. Russian forces are striking Orkhovatka where Ukrainian forces retreated after losing Ray-Oleksandrivka. (Source: @tass_agency/382687, @kpszsu/66618, @tass_agency/382709)

Occupants attacked two districts of Dnipropetrovsk Oblast over 40 times during the day. One man killed, one injured. Damaged objects include a gas station, enterprise, cargo vehicles, and minibuses. Fires broke out in a residential house and wheat field. (Source: @UkraineNow/82229)

UAV groups tracked across Dnipropetrovsk Oblast heading toward Zirychne/Samar from the north, with additional groups moving from Kharkiv Oblast into Dnipropetrovsk Oblast. A reactive UAV passed Zirychne heading west. (Source: @eRadarrua/98434, @kpszsu/66615, @kpszsu/66597)

Multiple UAV groups tracked across Sumy Oblast heading toward Okhtyrka, Shostka, and Novhorod-Siverskyi. Reactive UAVs crossed Sumy Oblast toward Poltava Oblast. Remaining UAVs noted near Shostka and Trostyanets. (Source: @kpszsu/66544, @kpszsu/66611, @kpszsu/66560, @eRadarrua/98467)

UAVs tracked on northern Kyiv Oblast heading toward Chernobyl. Groups tracked in Chernihiv Oblast toward Horodnia and Slavutich. UAVs tracked toward Chernihiv from the north and toward Bila Terkva/Kaharlyk. (Source: @kpszsu/66584, @kpszsu/66580, @kpszsu/66586, @kpszsu/66582)

A reactive Shahed continued moving toward Bila Terkva, with course changes noted toward Vasylkiv/Obukhiv and Vyshenky. Two Tsirkon missiles were reported heading toward Kyiv. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68103, @mon1tor_ua/68104, @mon1tor_ua/68101, @mon1tor_ua/68129)

Increased threat of ballistic strikes on Kyiv in the near term, with launch installations in Bryansk Oblast increased to 26 ballistic missiles. Air raid alerts were active for Kyiv on June 27-28, 2026. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68122, @eRadarrua/98407, @eRadarrua/98437, @eRadarrua/98466)
A Ukrainian drone killed two people in Petryanka village, Bryansk Oblast, striking a parked car near a shop. (Source: @tass_agency/382683)

UAVs tracked toward Zaporizhzhia from the southern direction. A reactive UAV from the Black Sea headed toward Mykolaiv Oblast. UAVs tracked on the border of Kherson and Mykolaiv Oblasts heading northwest. (Source: @kpszsu/66612, @kpszsu/66582, @kpszsu/66618)

Russian tactical aviation active in the Black Sea waters. Russian forces destroyed two Ukrainian MiG-29 aircraft at Voznesensk airfield in Mykolaiv Oblast using a Geran-4 Siker UAV. (Source: @kpszsu/66576, @tass_agency/382687)

A gas station in Zaporozhye burned down following a Russian airstrike. Gas station networks in Trostyanets completely destroyed. HUR MO fundraising for FPV drones to destroy Russian equipment heading to Crimea. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31201, @ukr_leaks_eng/31213, @mon1tor_ua/68125)
Ukrainian civilians detained in 2022 during occupation of Zaporizhzhia and other regions were returned home, including from Mariupol, Kyiv, Kharkiv, and Luhansk regions. (Source: @UkraineNow/82226)

Russia preparing major combined missile attack on Kyiv with ballistic, cruise, hypersonic missiles and strike drones. In previous attacks this month, Russia used over 30 ballistic missiles; in February a record of over 120 ballistic missiles in one month. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68110, @eRadarrua/98429)

Massive drone attack on Moscow underway with 67 drones reportedly shot down. Vnukovo and Domododedovo airports closed with mass flight delays. Strike UAV launches from Kursk (~13 groups), Gardeyskoye, and Oryol areas. (Source: @eRadarrua/98389, @eRadarrua/98427, @mon1tor_ua/68106)

Two Tsirkon missiles tracked toward Kyiv. A ballistic missile tracked toward Chuhuiv, Kharkiv Oblast. A reactive Shahed tracked toward Bila Terkva with course changes to Vasylkiv/Obukhiv. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68129, @mon1tor_ua/68136, @mon1tor_ua/68103, @mon1tor_ua/68104)

Ukrainian FP-5 Flamingo missiles struck the Titan-Barricady plant in Volgograd with confirmed hits and fires. Ukrainian drone struck a car in Bryansk Oblast killing two. (Source: @UkraineNow/82221, @tass_agency/382683)

Russian Geran-4 Siker UAV destroyed two Ukrainian MiG-29 aircraft at Voznesensk airfield, Mykolaiv Oblast. Russian tactical aviation active in Black Sea waters. (Source: @tass_agency/382687, @kpszsu/66576)

Reconnaissance UAVs operating in eastern Poltava Oblast near Opishnia and Karlivka may be designating targets for Russian strike systems. Assets have been engaged to shoot them down. (Source: @kpszsu/66548)

key_developments: Russia is preparing a major combined attack on Kyiv using ballistic, cruise, and hypersonic missiles plus strike drones, pending Tu-95MS bomber redeployment from Ukrainka to Olenya airfield. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68110)

Massive Ukrainian drone attack on Moscow underway with 67 drones reportedly shot down; Vnukovo and Domododedovo airports closed with mass flight delays across the Moscow aviation hub. (Source: @eRadarrua/98389)

Ukrainian FP-5 Flamingo missiles struck the Titan-Barricady plant in Volgograd, a facility producing artillery systems and missile launcher components, with confirmed hits and fires. (Source: @UkraineNow/82221)

Up to 30 Shahed drones launched from Kursk; multiple UAV groups tracked across Sumy, Kharkiv, Poltava, Chernihiv, and Dnipropetrovsk regions heading toward multiple cities. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68106, @kpszsu/66544, @kpszsu/66611)

Russian forces struck the Sambek Heights memorial complex near Taganrog, Rostov Oblast, injuring 12 including a seven-year-old girl; two Ukrainian MiG-29s destroyed at Voznesensk airfield by Geran-4 Siker. (Source: @tass_agency/382689, @tass_agency/382687)

Bryansk Oblast ballistic missile launch installations increased to 26; elevated threat of ballistic strikes on Kyiv in the near term. Two Tsirkon missiles tracked toward Kyiv. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68122, @mon1tor_ua/68129)
Seven Ukrainian civilians aged 35-66 returned home after illegal detention by Russia since 2022, from Mariupol, Kyiv, Kharkiv, Zaporizhzhia, and Luhansk regions. (Source: @UkraineNow/82226)
sections.threat_assessment: The threat level is critically elevated as Russia prepares a major combined missile and drone attack on Kyiv, pending strategic bomber redeployment. The accumulation of up to 26 ballistic missile launchers in Bryansk Oblast and warnings of increased ballistic threat indicate a large-scale strike is imminent. Simultaneously, Ukraine is conducting long-range strikes against strategic Russian targets including the Titan-Barricady plant in Volgograd and a major drone attack on Moscow, demonstrating continued deep-strike capability. The multi-axis drone assault across northern, eastern, and southern Ukraine is stretching Ukrainian air defense assets simultaneously.
sections.regional_response: Polish Foreign Minister Sikorski threatened that if Ukraine is not enough for Putin, Poland will respond as it always has, signaling potential escalation from NATO's eastern flank. Russia and China conducted joint strategic air patrol, demonstrating continued military cooperation. Fuel shortages in Ukrainian frontline areas are worsening as truck drivers refuse deliveries due to drone threats, while Russian strikes systematically target Ukrainian gas station infrastructure in Zaporozhye, Kharkov, and Trostyanets.
sections.intelligence_notes: The pattern of relative calm followed by massive combined attacks is consistent with Russian operational behavior described by eRadarrua, including previous attacks with over 800 drones and monthly records of over 120 ballistic missiles. The redeployment of Tu-95MS bombers from Ukrainka to Olenya suggests Russia is positioning standoff strike assets at safer distances. Ukrainian HUR MO's urgent fundraising for fiber-optic FPV drones to interdict logistics heading to Crimea indicates active efforts to disrupt Russian supply lines before they reach the front. The return of seven long-detained civilians may signal ongoing behind-the-scenes negotiations between the parties.
